title: orobus ohwianus
intro: Orobus ohwianus, also known as the Mountain Clover, is a perennial flowering plant that belongs to the legume family. It is native to North America and has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial properties. The plant is said to have various health benefits, such as relieving digestive issues, reducing fever, and soothing skin irritations. Orobus ohwianus can be prepared in various herbal forms, including teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are often used to treat a range of health conditions.
